title: Shirahoshi Becomes the Key
description: On pages 11–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The core beat is shirahoshi becomes the key.
scene: The scene follows shirahoshi becomes the key, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But of course it is!! Now come, Oonyuudou!! Swallow this!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and anniniliate the straw hat crew as our proud comrade!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: An energy steroid pill!! But will it really have any effect on his huge body with?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Cap'n deck'n!! I'm sorry I ever doubted you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All right!! He beat the kraken up good!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How can he counter an attack from such a gigantic enemy?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Nami-San got caught up in the shockwave!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Who is it dis time?!! DAT hurts!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That guy's kick is hurting him too?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How strong must his kicks be to hurt a creature the size of a mountain?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you give our beautiful Navigator so much as a scratch...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...how do you plan on making up for it, huh?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Pay for your sins with your life, Jumbo Manjuu!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please, stop this!! We're on your side, remember?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is way beyond his normal drunken attitude!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He's TONS more powerful than usual !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Even steel can't stop his blades!!!

summary: Shirahoshi Becomes the Key. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
